hypothesis: The machine becomes more deterministic if any systems-optimizer ratchet that can mutate `GGD/**` must prove both binding integrity and equation-law execution inside its fixed evaluation bundle.
measurement: Before the ratchet, systems-optimizer cards with `GGD/**` in writable_scope were allowed to omit both `node CLAW/scripts/verify-ggd-binding.mjs` and the equation-engine lawset check, so a GGD-mutating slice could promote without proving binding integrity or executable law execution. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects that omission and the fixed evaluation bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if `CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` fails any future GGD-mutating card that omits either required command and the fixed evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Any systems-optimizer slice that can mutate `GGD/**` must carry both binding verification and executable equation-law checks in its fixed evaluation bundle, or the machine can drift its truth layer without proving law integrity.
